option.name: originalContent
option.value:
version: "3.9"
services: orders-db: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: orders-db environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres POSTGRES_DB: orders_db ports: - "5432:5432" volumes: - orders_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data - ./order-service/migrations:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5
payments-db: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: payments-db environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres POSTGRES_DB: payments_db ports: - "5433:5432" volumes: - payments_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data - ./payment-service/migrations:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5
payment-service: build: context: ./payment-service dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: payment-service environment: HTTP_PORT: "8081" GRPC_PORT: "9091" DB_HOST: payments-db DB_PORT: "5432" DB_USER: postgres DB_PASSWORD: postgres DB_NAME: payments_db ports: - "8081:8081" - "9091:9091" # gRPC — called by Order Service depends_on: payments-db: condition: service_healthy
order-service: build: context: ./order-service dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: order-service environment: HTTP_PORT: "8080" GRPC_PORT: "9090" DB_HOST: orders-db DB_PORT: "5432" DB_USER: postgres DB_PASSWORD: postgres DB_NAME: orders_db PAYMENT_SERVICE_GRPC_ADDR: "payment-service:9091" PAYMENT_TIMEOUT_SECS: "5" ports: - "8080:8080" - "9090:9090" # gRPC — for SubscribeToOrderUpdates streaming depends_on: orders-db: condition: service_healthy payment-service: condition: service_started
volumes: orders_data: payments_data:

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
version: "3.9"
services: orders-db: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: orders-db environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres POSTGRES_DB: orders_db ports: - "5435:5432" volumes: - orders_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data - ./order-service/migrations:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5
payments-db: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: payments-db environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres POSTGRES_DB: payments_db ports: - "5436:5432" volumes: - payments_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data - ./payment-service/migrations:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5
payment-service: build: context: . dockerfile: payment-service/Dockerfile container_name: payment-service environment: HTTP_PORT: "8081" GRPC_PORT: "9091" DB_HOST: payments-db DB_PORT: "5432" DB_USER: postgres DB_PASSWORD: postgres DB_NAME: payments_db ports: - "8081:8081" - "9091:9091" # gRPC — called by Order Service depends_on: payments-db: condition: service_healthy
order-service: build: context: . dockerfile: order-service/Dockerfile container_name: order-service environment: HTTP_PORT: "8080" GRPC_PORT: "9090" DB_HOST: orders-db DB_PORT: "5432" DB_USER: postgres DB_PASSWORD: postgres DB_NAME: orders_db PAYMENT_SERVICE_GRPC_ADDR: "payment-service:9091" PAYMENT_TIMEOUT_SECS: "5" ports: - "8080:8080" - "9090:9090" # gRPC — for SubscribeToOrderUpdates streaming depends_on: orders-db: condition: service_healthy payment-service: condition: service_started
volumes: orders_data: payments_data:

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
FROM golang:1.22-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app COPY go.mod go.sum ./ RUN go mod download COPY . . RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -o payment-service ./cmd/payment-service
FROM alpine:3.19 RUN apk --no-cache add ca-certificates WORKDIR /root/ COPY --from=builder /app/payment-service . EXPOSE 8081 CMD ["./payment-service"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM golang:1.22-alpine AS builder
# Set up /generated so the replace directive (../generated) resolves correctly WORKDIR /generated COPY generated/go.mod generated/go.sum ./ COPY generated/ .
# Build the payment service WORKDIR /app COPY payment-service/go.mod payment-service/go.sum ./ RUN go mod download COPY payment-service/ . RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -o payment-service ./cmd/payment-service
FROM alpine:3.19 RUN apk --no-cache add ca-certificates WORKDIR /root/ COPY --from=builder /app/payment-service . EXPOSE 8081 EXPOSE 9091 CMD ["./payment-service"]
